section_miscategorizations.text: We will order an EKG today to monitor her cardiac status.
section_miscategorizations.reason: An EKG result is already documented in Findings ("The EKG shows no acute abnormalities."). Ordering an EKG again in the Plan without clarifying that the prior EKG was historical or separate can mislead the reader about whether the documented EKG result is from today or a prior study, conflating current findings with future orders.
